title: Hartree-Fock Theory: The Mean-Field Approximation
description: Learn the foundations of Hartree-Fock theory, the cornerstone of electronic structure theory that approximates electron-electron interactions through an average (mean) field.
learningObjectives: Explain the mean-field approximation in Hartree-Fock theory
Derive the Hartree-Fock equations from the variational principle
Understand the physical meaning of exchange and Coulomb operators
Connect HF to configuration interaction and correlation methods
Appreciate HF as the starting point for quantum chemistry
